One verse from The Gita. Everyday.

The Bhagavad Gita is one of the world's oldest and most quoted texts, and probably one of the most bookmarked-for-later, too.

The Gita Drop sends you one verse a day, in plain English, with the story behind it and a clear, honest look at what it means for your life today.

No credit card needed for trial.

The best thing you can give a curious kid is language for their feelings.

Warriors. Best friends. Impossible choices. The Gita is full of the stuff kids are already obsessed with. It just needs someone to open the door.

🦁
Real feelings, real words
Not platitudes. Actual concepts. Courage. Detachment. Duty. Given to kids before they need them most.
💬
A question for the table
Each drop ends with a conversation starter. For the car, for dinner, for that quiet moment before bed.
📬
One verse. Once a day.
Not overwhelming. Not a chore. Just enough to make it feel like something they look forward to.
